heading: Grant authorization
label: 12221 Grant authorization
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 13861 of Title 42

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Attorney General may make grants to State, Indian tribal, or local prosecutors for the purpose of supporting the creation or expansion of community-based justice programs.

children.heading: Consultation
children.label: b Consultation
children.text: The Attorney General may consult with the Ounce of Prevention Council in making grants under subsection (a).
